overall.description: A third-person game engine sequence showing a character in a dark coat exploring a desolate rocky landscape. The character walks steadily from an open grassland area past ancient stone ruins, through a narrow canyon passage, and emerges onto a coastal cliff overlooking the ocean under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with ancient stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open terrain toward distant rock formations and a tall stone monolith

entered.detail: ancient monolithic stone structure standing vertically in the landscape
large rocky hills and mountain formations in the background
patches of purple flowering plants along the left side of the path
massive rock formation rising on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland area under an overcast sky, approaching a tall ancient stone pillar. Sparse vegetation including purple flowers lines the dirt path, while large rock formations loom in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage between steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the confined canyon passage with rock walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
tall steep rock wall forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
piles of broken rocks and debris accumulated along the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow canyon with steep rock walls enclosing the path on both sides. The character continues walking forward through the confined space, passing piles of stone rubble as the canyon gradually descends toward a distant opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlook with ocean view

events.description: exits the narrow canyon onto an open coastal cliff with the ocean becoming visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: emerging from the canyon and walking along the coastal cliff edge overlooking the vast ocean

entered.detail: vast expanse of ocean water visible beyond the cliff edge with waves breaking on rocks
steep cliff face dropping down to the water on the left side
tall isolated rock formations standing in the ocean water
white water and surf breaking against the coastal rocks below

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the canyon onto a wide coastal cliff overlooking the ocean. The scene opens up to reveal vast waters, isolated rock stacks rising from the sea, and waves breaking against the cliffs below, with the path continuing along the cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads a character from an open, desolate grassland through a confining canyon and out onto a vast coastal cliff. It begins on a dirt path lined with purple flowers and sparse vegetation, moving past a tall ancient stone pillar toward looming rock formations under an overcast sky. As the terrain shifts, the open landscape narrows into a steep-walled canyon where the camera follows the character past piles of stone rubble through the descending, confined space. The scene then opens abruptly as the character emerges from the canyon onto a wide cliff edge, revealing a panoramic view of the ocean. Finally, the perspective expands to show isolated rock stacks rising from the sea and waves breaking against the cliffs below.
